description: Single source of truth for CV generation. Immutable fields are NEVER generated — only interpolated. This file is hand-maintained by Arinze. The LLM never edits it.

application_defaults.visa_status: UK student visa (graduating 25 June 2026). Will immediately apply for Graduate visa route (2 years unrestricted work rights). No sponsorship required now or in foreseeable future.

headline.note: Base headline. Can be overridden per role for job-specific tailoring.

phone.note: Removed — phone not needed on UK tech CVs. Email + LinkedIn is standard.

aptech_diploma.value: Advanced Diploma in Software Engineering (ADSE Java)

cv_project_selection.description: Which 4 projects appear on CVs. Default set applies to all roles. CaseFRAME replaces HaxJobs for finance-adjacent roles only (fintech, banking, insurance, compliance, fraud, AML, KYC).
cv_project_selection.rule: FRAME, Haxaml, Pharmax, HaxJobs — always. Swap HaxJobs out for CaseFRAME only when the role is finance-adjacent.

frame.subtitle: Typed Project Memory Format for AI Agents
public_evidence: Five-part memory model (Facts, Rules, Acts, Map, Expect) for AI coding agent context
Reduces repeated prompting, context rot, and full-repo rescans across agent sessions
Designed as a portable standard: any AI agent reads the same project representation
Published docs, learn materials, and frame-python implementation track on GitHub
Separation of concerns: FRAME = the contract, implementations earn alignment with it

haxaml.subtitle: AI Agent Governance & Project Memory
public_evidence: Governance runtime enforcing FRAME correctness contract — blocks AI-generated code until mechanical checks pass
Five-stage pipeline: Admission → Scoped Context → Agent Work → Verification → Recording
MCP server so AI coding tools can read/write project memory during sessions
Local dashboard for inspecting agent session history and project state
Published on PyPI with documentation, setup flow, and adoption guides

pharmax.subtitle: Pharmacy Management Platform
public_evidence: Products CRUD with multi-unit pricing (tablets, packs, strips)
Full invoice lifecycle: draft to finalise (auto stock deduction) to cancel (stock reversal)
Stock adjustments with audit trail
Reorder-level tracking
Role-based access with JWT authentication
Comprehensive pytest suite covering endpoints, business logic, and edge cases
Sat with pharmacy staff to understand manual processes and turned them into software
pharmax.proprietary_context: The full SaaS includes AI features but these are NOT in the public repo. CV claims must stick to public_evidence only.

haxaml.subtitle: AI Agent Governance & Project Memory
public_evidence: Five-part FRAME memory model (Facts, Rules, Acts, Map, Expect) for AI agent context
MCP server so AI coding tools can read/write project memory during sessions
Local dashboard for inspecting agent session history and project state
Published on PyPI with documentation, setup flow, and adoption guides
CLI tooling for managing project memory files

caseframe.subtitle: AI Continuity for Financial Crime Investigations
public_evidence: Python loader and validator for structured case packs from YAML
Concrete example: reopened sanctions review with unresolved counterparty links
State-resumption model — investigation reopens from real case state, not from zero

haxjobs.subtitle: Automated Job Search & Application Platform
public_evidence: Multi-platform job discovery across 95+ companies (Lever, Ashby, Greenhouse APIs)
Hermes-powered job evaluation pipeline scoring fit to user profile
5-level automated application pack generation with CV, cover letter, Q&A
Web dashboard for pipeline monitoring with real-time job status views
Zero-token discovery via system-level cron scheduling, independent of LLM

archilles.subtitle: Production AI Agent Infrastructure
public_evidence: 24/7 cloud-based AI agent running on Hermes Agent framework (fork)
Multi-agent coordination across messaging, automation, and document generation
Cron-scheduled job discovery and application pack pipelines
Cross-platform messaging gateway (Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp)

language_rules.bullet_rhythm_rule: mix short (5-8 words) and long (12-18 words) bullets
